name: Beast Barber
author: Poki
description: Beast Barber is an animal game where you get to shave all kinds of enormous, wacky creatures. Help them get a proper haircut by shaving them, selling the wool/fur, and upgrading your machine to give your critter customers the best experience possible! Are you ready to get to work? How to play Beast Barber? Drive around and shave the beasts with WASD, the arrow keys, or by pressing the corresponding buttons on mobile! Sell the hair you cut, and buy upgrades by driving over the circles on the beast’s back Who created Beast Barber? Beast Barber is created by Petit Kyanpu. Play their other game on Poki: Jetpack Fury ! How can I play Beast Barber for free? You can play Beast Barber for free on Poki. Can I play Beast Barber on mobile devices and desktop? Beast Barber can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
